pair.title: Frigate NVR — Connect via MQTT
pair.mqttUrlHint: Must match the broker Frigate is configured to use. Use mqtt:// for plain or mqtts:// for TLS.
pair.mqttPrefixHint: The topic_prefix set in Frigate's config.yml (default: frigate)
pair.frigateUrl: Frigate URL (for snapshot & clip links in flows)
pair.frigateUrlHint: e.g. https://frigate.example.com — only used to build snapshot/clip URLs in flow tokens
pair.frigateLocalUrl: Frigate local URL (for live camera image)
pair.frigateLocalUrlHint: Internal URL without auth, e.g. http://192.168.1.100:5000 — used to fetch the live image on the device card. Required if the external URL goes through a reverse proxy that does not expose /api/{camera}/latest.jpg. Never expose your live CCTV without authentication to the internet.
pair.connecting: Connecting to MQTT broker and discovering cameras…
pair.connectFailed: Connection failed. Check your MQTT broker URL and credentials.
pair.alertInvalidMqttUrl: Invalid MQTT URL. Must start with mqtt:// or mqtts://
pair.orManual: — or enter a camera name manually —
pair.manualCameraHint: Enter names not in the list above, or enter all names manually if none were discovered.
pair.alertEmptyCameraName: Select at least one camera or enter a name manually

settings.mqtt_topic_prefix_hint: topic_prefix set in Frigate config (default: frigate)
settings.frigate_url: Frigate URL (optional — for snapshot/clip links in flows)
settings.frigate_url_hint: External or local URL used to build snapshot_url and clip_url flow tokens. e.g. https://frigate.example.com
settings.frigate_local_url: Frigate local URL (optional — for live camera image)
settings.frigate_local_url_hint: Internal URL used to fetch the live camera image (e.g. http://192.168.1.100:5000). Required if frigate_url goes through a reverse proxy that does not expose /api/{camera}/latest.jpg.
settings.label_filter_hint: Only fire the object-detected trigger for these labels, e.g. person,car,dog
